pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and verifier.py logic
Task description in task.json and verifier.py logic
Task description ('December 2010 trip') and actual XML data in SampleDivesV2.ssrf (<trip date='2010-12-04'>)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world dive log data from the official Subsurface repository (SampleDivesV2.ssrf). The target trip correctly corresponds to the date prefix '2010-12' (December 2010). The target state metadata perfectly matches the task instructions: updating the trip location to 'Hood Canal Winter Retreat' and adding the note 'Instructor training weekend'. All metadata claims are verified.
